zh.title: 鲁道夫·施泰纳预言全集 - 人智学创始人对人类未来的预言与验证 | Rudolf Steiner Prophecies
zh.description: 奥地利哲学家、人智学创始人鲁道夫·施泰纳（1861-1925）关于人类未来的预言完整收录，涵盖战争、唯物主义后果、疫苗与医学、灵性进化、科技对灵魂的影响、阿里曼化身等领域。

en.title: Rudolf Steiner Prophecies - Predictions from the Founder of Anthroposophy (1861-1925) | Full Archive & Verification
en.description: Austrian philosopher and founder of Anthroposophy Rudolf Steiner (1861-1925) left profound predictions about humanity's future, covering wars, materialism's consequences, vaccines and medicine, spiritual evolution, technology's effects on the soul, and the incarnation of Ahriman.
en.ogTitle: Rudolf Steiner Prophecies - Complete Predictions from the Founder of Anthroposophy
en.ogDescription: Predictions from Austrian philosopher Rudolf Steiner (1861-1925), founder of Anthroposophy. Full archive with verification covering wars, materialism, spiritual evolution, and technology.
en.twitterDescription: Predictions from Rudolf Steiner, founder of Anthroposophy. Covering world wars, materialism, Ahriman's incarnation, spiritual evolution, and more.
